narrative:
Erie County has 52,049 registered voters, with 58.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.7%, a modest Democratic lean of 3.8 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 33.2% of registrants.
